title: Cobblemon Super Enhanced
description:
This Cobblemon modpack puts you in the world of Cobblemon, but to advance threw world of Cobblemon you'll need to defeat the 8 gym leaders from the original Gen 1 Games.

And who knows you might even find a shiny Mon out there
body:
This Cobblemon modpack puts you in the world of Cobblemon, but to advance threw world of Cobblemon you'll need to defeat the 8 gym leaders from the original Gen 1 Games. This Modpack also adds a minimap and a world map so then you dont get lost while exploring the world. it also adds the essenntial mod which lets ypu acsess multiplayer so then you can player with your frineds


The some mods in this modmack include:

-Cobbledollars

-Cobblemon

-Cobblemon: legends

-Cobblemon Mega showdown 

-Essential Mod

-Gravestones

-Radical Cobblemon Trainers

-Sodium

-Tree Harvester

-Veinminer enchant

-Xaeros Minimap

-Xaeros World Map

and there are many more mods
